name: Cross-group transfer between members of different groups
description: Source is member of group 0xdc18, sink is member of group 0xf6e5. No direct trust between them. Solver finds mixed path: direct token transfer + group mint via sink's group. Tests that the solver can bridge disconnected trust clusters through group minting.
notes: Achieves full 1 CRC target. 4 steps. Mixed path: some direct, some via group.
